heading: Designation of Steens Mountain Wilderness Area
label: 460nnn–61 Designation of Steens Mountain Wilderness Area
text: The Federal lands in the Cooperative Management and Protection Area depicted as wilderness on the map entitled “Steens Mountain Wilderness Area” and dated , are hereby designated as wilderness and therefore as a component of the National Wilderness Preservation System. The wilderness area shall be known as the Steens Mountain Wilderness Area.September 18, 2000
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Section 201 also enacted provisions listed in a table of Wilderness Areas set out under .section 201 of Pub. L. 106–399section 1132 of this title
